[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000010 2
1 0100001001 3
2 0010010001 3
3 1000001001 3
4 0110000000 2
5 1111001111 8
6 0010000110 3
7 0000000110 2

01 10 0111000110 5
12 21 0010000110 3 match 6
23 32 0000000110 2 match 7
34 43 0001000011 3
45 54 0000110001 3
56 65 0100010001 3
67 76 0010000001 2
70 07 0010001000 2

02 20 0010000110 3 match 6
13 31 0101000111 5
24 42 0010000010 2 match 0

46 64 0010010001 3 match 2
57 75 1000001001 3 match 3
60 06 0110000000 2 match 4
71 17 1010000001 3

14 41 0011010011 5
25 52 0000000000 a
36 63 0100000001 2

50 05 0100001000 2
61 16 0110010001 4
72 27 0010000000 1
